# Routes scanned for accessibility on every pull request.
#
# The PR check used to scan only "/", which is 1 of the ~55 public pages. That
# meant a change to the pricing page — the one screen where money changes hands
# — was never checked at all. Keep this list to the paths where a regression
# costs us a customer or a legal claim; the nightly job covers the full sitemap.
#
# One path per line. Blank lines and # comments are ignored.

/
/pricing
/checkout/success
/free-scan
/docs
/faq
/statement
